stock_market.summary: Global markets are mixed as US futures rally on potential de-escalation of the Iran conflict, while Asian markets remain pressured. Oil prices stay elevated near $113/barrel, raising concerns about potential global recessionary impacts.

key_metrics.market_trend: Cautious relief in US, persistent volatility globally
key_metrics.impact: Iran geopolitical tension, high energy costs, recession risks

art_market.summary: The 2026 Global Art Market Report indicates a 4% rebound in 2025, reaching $59.6 billion. The market shows resilience, particularly in high-end segments, despite geopolitical and economic headwinds.

key_metrics.major_events: 2026 Global Art Market Report findings, strong high-end sales
